# NeuroWealth Web Rebuild Issue Backlog

This list is for rebuilding the frontend as a **web app** using dummy/mock data in the current phase.
Backend and wallet integrations are explicitly out of scope for now and will be handled in a later phase.

## Design Direction

Each UI issue must include a professional design specification with the following, expressed in objective terms (no stylistic buzzwords):
- Palette: hex values for primary, accent, warning, danger, backgrounds, text
- Typography: families, weights, sizes, line-heights, letter-spacing
- Spacing and elevation: spacing scale, radii, border, shadow tokens
- Components: required states (default/hover/active/disabled/loading/error)
- Accessibility: color contrast targets (WCAG AA or above), focus indicators, keyboard support

## Using this backlog

Each work item has its own file in this folder (YAML frontmatter + sections). Create GitHub issues via **Issues → New issue** using a repository template, or paste a backlog file’s body under the issue title.
